creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
This probably stems from the fact that the authors of these packages are using odd naming/versioning schemes.  (v2-5-10 vs 2.5.10, padthv1-lv2 and padthv1_0_8_6 vs padthv-0.8.6).

Unless you are interested in trying to patch the portscout code, I'd probably just configure portscout to ignore these two ports:

https://portscout.freebsd.org/info/portscout-portconfig.txt
